content:
Heyo, new player. Need some help with teams I could build, also which units I could/should aim for when I get the chance to grab them. Also curious who yall think I should get from the 2nd anni selector <:thumbsup:904618709535043584> 
My current teams are:
Mouche helot thais aigis
Salvador faint thais aigis
Between Jenkins and Uvhash who should I pull for OE first?
Imo either Kat (and wait for her banner to hit E3), Gdoll (really need OE to function properly), or Pickman (usable at E0)
Jenkin imo
Castor, nobody else
He works best at E0
Oh right Castor!
Forgot he in the pool too
Definitely Castor
Best Ultra ever
yesyes
His E is massive glowups but still amazing at E0 unlike Kat and gdoll
Is there any content in the game that requires you to use a pure team or is the option to mix and match always there?
Option is always there
There is. One. And it's pretty ez
Ah, I figured that might require it at some point
I forgot that existed
Everywhere else you can mix
That’s mostly for rewards snd stuff and not an actual game mode
If that makes sense?
I was gonna get kath and get her to e3 over time since shes so flexible. Who would I use castor with? Not familiar with his team options
That said, any suggestions on who meshes well with Corposant? Been having a lot of fun with her and want to change things up a bit
Yeah it's pretty much a tutorial than an actual game mode
Aurita (free unit), casiah, murphy and tulu
It takes 3 months to reach Aurita OE though
Or Tulu, Goliath, Clem for maximum dmg
Maybe with Mouch?? Looking @ ur lineup I just think you need Castor with a big dps
They are like, Discard units so they mix well with her. Corpo is pretty standalone tho
Just spam her 4cost <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
Castor E0 is best with shield and is really powerful
You just need a heavy hitter / someone who does x amount of hits to take advantage of his corrosion
Haven't gotten tulu yet, but I can see how casiah would mesh
Yeah that's why I want to up Jenkins
Jenkin is also good at E0, gets better obviously but she works fine with Castor

If my best bet rn is with mouche I might wait for his rerun since I really want to build dtide teams first, considering my mouche team is fine <:Jenkin_think:1459079611131494543> I see at least 3 kha teams I could easily build, just need gramona and tinct for that. No worries Im def getting him at his rerun or the next selector though 😭
Not really a must imo. Tulu is there because his cards are costly and has Discard so you don't play his card much if at all. He is really lore accurate, the afk king
If you do pull Blue standard a lot (like, for E3 caecus and E2 Goliath) you might actually get him at some point
Blue standard only has 3 limiteds in the pool, its doable. I got him as well from there
I got him from there too
Dude's not taking my lumi anytime soon
Aurita oe is really not important
Aurita does 0 dmg
She can after a couple exalts but a lot of it is tentacle hits
A COUPLE?!?!
More than 2 a fight is already unrealistic
Not really,  her aliemus gain is pretty good
Depends on the boss though
Aurora used it like 5x on w4 last dtide
Aurita aliemus gain is faster than gdoll
<:Doll_Inferno_serenity:1459091720229752843>
what covs does Miryam want?
Mostly whatever the team needs
You can use Reevolution on her though if no one else is using it
Dream is also good on her if shes invested
yeah Miryam isn't really locked into 1 cov. Just use what is not already occupied.

both her and her sig are E0 at the moment

also looks like she could also use anything that gives crit dmg
lifedrain, dream, re-evo
Dreams with useless exalted pure card is….ehhhhh
you would really want her E2 tho. Prepare and Retain for her 3cost is huge
Yeah you kinda want to sell that
not that she would break without it but you know how good to have prep and retain
2 Chosens is so good though
never thought I'd ever see ppl suggesting to sell a card with pierce damage and perma-str gen xD
Its an ok card but you really dont want 2 of them
And its only ok if she has quite a bit of cdmg
btw Miryam has the best portrait relic imo
so many ritual cards, so much aliemus, so much heal...

It’s good but there are def better
GMurphy is unbalanced and Cas gives permanent str down which just breaks the game
this should be ok for now right?
(idk I just want to use Caecus anywhere again)
you should be fine with that
or use Thais in place of Caecus and spam Waltz
I'm kinda sad that your Gmurphy hasn't reached OE tho
I mean, I would even whale her out if I could, but I'm no whale 🤷‍♀️
All I'm going to say is that this team severely lacks dmg
her OE is pretty rad. but even if it's not, being able to overcap is comfortable enough
I'm open to any other Aequor comp too, I literally own every unit from there now
For arc1
Arc 2 Caecus to be replaced
Faros/Tulu
Caecus fits Bluewill team
Dtide team suggestions?
Isn't Dtide dominated by Monowil these days?
Tawil is not even used sometimes
They wanted to put Caecus somewhere
He's still vuln inflict so could go just anywhere for it if there's free spot
I'm afraid Tawil isn't dominating anything in general <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775>
Shes dominating the retirement home <:Oldge:1274919261957263380>
need help building a tentacle team
any recommendations?
Hello, what stats should i aim for burial grounds?
Trying the mouchette team
Burial ground just put in as much DR as possible, follow by damage amp and keyflare
In mouchette team, helot and aigis should both be using burial grounds right?
Helot and thais, you want aigis to be your keyflare unit
Is aigis a better flex slot or E2 lily/E3 Gdoll for mouchette team

Depends on how long the fight goes for
Short fight aigis, long fight the other 2
hey guys what is the covenant set that is recomended for daffodil ?
im using crimsom pulse
and i saw a guy using re-evolution, so pls anyone that know what covenant set fit daffodil best pls tell me
april tribute is most popular with steppenwolf second most popular i believe
im going for a more stregth focus so i guess i will stick to crimson pulse
Crimson Pulse has nothing to do with strength <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Should i get miryam wod 1st of duplicate first? Also how much duplicate should i get minimum?
her wheel isn't super critical to her performance. you want to get her englighten 2 as your priority. so 3 total copies of her including the one you already have

sorry i express myself wrong what i whanted to say is since im making a build focused on stregth debuffs covenants like steppenwolf wont be very usefull crimson pulse gives an extra crit damage and chance since daffo dont start the exploration with high crit and damage i hope i clear the mistake
maybe i can try using dream of medicine since it gives and extra copy of the character cards
What's a good wod for her? I'm currently using rewinding time
but that is just my opinion alone thats why im asking
you can kinda just run whatever really, any support wheel is likely fine. she doesn't have any stats that are super critical to use or anything on her

If you're relying on Daffodil's 3-cost to deal damage, you'll be very disappointed 
She mainly plays off her poison and counter mirages, which benefit from Steppenwolf set bonus 

April's Praise gives you both crit rate and crit damage without requiring you to use the posse, so it is a better choice than Crimson Pulse in the majority of situations too
Daffodil is a character that relies on big burst turns, so the condition of enemy being above 70% HP at the start of the turn is not a big deal
yea i understand that, if you dont mind whats the diference betwin leap and quasar ?
you can use dream as an off meta pick. the other two we listed are the most popular but any of the ones we've talked about are likely usable
Please do not put Dreams on Daffodil <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
why not ?
flares says it's usable for what it's worth

As I said, she mostly relies on her exalt cards to deal damage
Adding 2 extra Daffodil's cards into your deck does not benefit you in any way, you're just bloating your deck and bleeding 8 sigils per battle for no reason
Flares also says Doresain is a good Kath support
I dont even want one copy of her 3 cost <:flop1:1356083604236800030>

There's virtually no difference between them outside of Ultra turn
While in Ultra turn, Leap cards always activate their Leap effect, while Quasar cards just cost 1 less arithmetica
hey gdoll need more alimens(dont know how to spell) or damage amp ? on her covenant and wheels ?
gdoll wants nothing but aliemus
example of a gdoll build
you can use either re-evolution or organic form for the covenant
organic form has a nasty downside so its not as good if you are in danger of dying
oh i ask cuz im pretty sure i read that the poison ammount is based on damage or something like that

keyflare!!!
also rm if ur doing gdoll cheese 🧀
normally gdoll is not the main poison dps so it doesnt matter
you can have some substats
Also for the 🧀, dreams is the best since more 3 costs!
understand
but you shouldnt be putting damage amp wheels on her
her job is to battery everyone and trigger poison
if in a poison team
cheese ?
if your heading immediately towards the final boss in dtide (so no story)
You can use a Gdoll cheese comp
thought
what is her cheese comp ?
It's getting harder to clear with it every patch
Gdoll faint and two flexes
Nymph Lily Nautlia Agrippa Lotan oe Doll
how faint helps ? isint her a more survival buffer ?
Yes
Gdoll batteries faint
So you can reach high amounts of dr
You use gdoll to stack posion
It's a stall team sort off
ok, may i ask why 24 appear in so many teams of diferent realms ?
She works differently in each realm
she gains new kit based on ur current realm
that quite nice i guess
what is her stronger kit ?
Aqueor and Ultra but 24 overall is meh
thanks alot one more thing before i go murpy is popular ?, or very used ?

Murphy is a solid defense unit used In tentacle team
Works good for Gmurphy even though she isn't lem
could i get some help on teams, Covenants and Wods
i included the 2 teams ive been using
Mouchette team looks alright, you probably want to run agis over ramona for more consistent vulnerability and stun. R wheels will help with your arc 1 story clears
Also, Burial ground on helot/thais/aigis until you get a set of life drain
The doorstain team doesn't need aggripa, try aigis/winkle/horla
Posse wise, you should be running a discover posse or uhvash posse or tiny wish,  since you don't have doresain posse yet. Pickman story posse also works
Don't run to dearest friend on doorstain,  if Irrc, his exalt doesn't get the 25% crit rate effect from that wheel, you are better off running analysis of death
What is Discover posse? And how do i get Uhvash posse?
Oh and for mouchette secondary wheel, use a crti wheel instead, her event sr wheel not very good on her
Posse with a discover keyword, it's to synergies with pickman 4 cost
Uhvash posse unlock through his side story
Usign the reality verge thingy you get from daily reward
Discover keyword?
Yea some posse allow you to discover a card/discover another posse
You may not have them unlocked yet

It's called Voracious Resolve 
Unlocked in a side story with Agrippa, in the same menu as Miryam's Desecrate story
Culinary Dominion or something like that
these are the only ones i have at the moment
You could just use tiny wish tbh
That's probably fine for a doresain team in arc 1
What is the best whell for Miryam
She can hold whatever,  since her role and function does not require her to be built in a specific way
But she does scales off crit damage, so she can hold crit damage wheels if you want to make use of that scaling
But really thou, it's not needed
not tawil carrying my ass through p dive (i haven't built her at all)
tawil is pretty good

Yup I can do that
ok so in this game when you pull for a character you are going to use, try to get multiple copies

Do you feel like investing in Mouchette? 
If yes, get her to E2/E3 and run Mouchette - Thais - Helot - Aigis 
If not, just go with Doresain - Thais - Aigis - Horla
Ok thanks for the advice didnt knew that it was that important
I do want to play Doresain do I have to continue pulling on him ?
he's pretty niche

on one hand, if you like him, it's a good idea

however be warned he falls off at high difficulty and against bosses

so he will seem really strong until he isn't. he cannot do most stages in endgame dtide without good support

He's fine at E0, but if you really enjoy playing him, then E3 is a reasonable stopping point too
Although, do be aware, he has a tendency of struggling in end game due to the way his kit is designed

Should perform well in the early and mid game though
Especially chapter 7
Okay okay you are really kind for the advice thanks to you
LETS GOOOO MOUAHAHAHAHHAHA

Yeah thats how I call the hentai thingy class (so op I tried Murphy awakened she is so op)

His wheel is indeed good on him, so you could grab it if you have pulls to spare
Alternatively, just use Blade of the Titan
For the second slot put the SR wheel Analysis of Death, and for his covenant use Crimson Pulse

Horla should hold DR wheels and Burial covenant for her talent scaling
Elevated Focus is a good wheel to put on Thais
For the rest, just put whichever rare wheels you want to run

What teams would you recommend for miryiam?
uhhh
need your expertise here
Myriam is suitable as both a Aequor support as well as a battery in non Aequor teams, although her value is naturally diminished in the latter
Ideally she’s paired with either 24 or GMurphy as the primary dps
HOWEVER, units that want to spam their exalts such as Daffodil, Castor, Sanga are all viable alternatives
If you’re willing you can also pair her with Goliath although that comp will struggle to put results more than others
Anyways feel free to experiment because generally speaking you can create results no matter the pairing, just need a viable dps
Thank you
